label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this gift exchange problem. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. The goal is to track who ends up with which present after a series of swaps. First, I need to list out the initial presents each person has: - Alice: Green - Bob: White - Claire: Black - Dave: Orange - Eve: Yellow Now, there are five swaps that happen in sequence. Let me go through each swap one by one and update the presents accordingly. First swap: Bob and Alice swap. So Alice, who originally had green, will now have Bob's white present. Bob will have Alice's original green present. So after first swap: - Alice: White - Bob: Green - Claire: Black - Dave: Orange
